# User Retention Dashboard

This dashboard provides comprehensive insights into user retention patterns and cohort behavior.

## Key Metrics

- **Monthly Retention Rate**: Track how many users return each month
- **Cohort Analysis**: Understand user behavior by signup cohorts
- **Retention Trends**: Identify patterns in user engagement over time

## Use Cases

- Product managers analyzing user engagement
- Growth teams optimizing retention strategies  
- Executive reporting on user lifecycle metrics

## Data Sources

- User activity logs
- Registration data
- Engagement events

The retention analysis helps identify critical drop-off points and opportunities for improving user experience.
